The bioactive constituents of Xalkitis ciliata include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Xalkitis ciliata is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture to treat various ailments, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote digestion and relieve abdominal pain.
